scripts.validate:scripts: node --check scripts/app-config.mjs && node --check scripts/build-registry.mjs && node --check scripts/new-app.mjs && node --check scripts/presets.mjs && node --check scripts/test-forge.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-app-configs.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-update-contract.mjs
scripts.validate:all: npm run registry:check && npm run validate:scripts && npm run validate:configs && npm run validate && npm run validate:mobile && npm run validate:updates
scripts.health: npm run validate:all && npm run test:forge
